test-case.description: resolves pwsh explicitly when the current host is Windows PowerShell
test-case.name: Invoke-WhatIfValidation helper.resolves pwsh explicitly when the current host is Windows PowerShell

test-case.description: blocks installer execution when publisher validation fails
test-case.name: V5 Adobe Acrobat refresh behavior.blocks installer execution when publisher validation fails

test-case.description: returns a WhatIf result and suppresses Start-Process during preview without elevation
test-case.name: V5 Adobe Acrobat refresh behavior.returns a WhatIf result and suppresses Start-Process during preview without elevation

test-case.description: returns a skipped result when the package path is missing during a real run
test-case.name: V5 Adobe Acrobat refresh behavior.returns a skipped result when the package path is missing during a real run

test-case.description: removes stale files that are absent from the current source output
test-case.name: Sandbox WhatIf output sync helper.removes stale files that are absent from the current source output

test-case.description: returns a failure count and writes a summary when any target fails
test-case.name: Sandbox WhatIf validation helper.returns a failure count and writes a summary when any target fails

test-case.description: returns a skipped result when the printer name pattern is not configured
test-case.name: V5 named printer removal behavior.returns a skipped result when the printer name pattern is not configured

test-case.description: uses a secured per-user path and unique file name for the basic export preview
test-case.name: V5 printer export hardening.uses a secured per-user path and unique file name for the basic export preview

test-case.description: uses a secured per-user path and unique file name for the full export preview
test-case.name: V5 printer export hardening.uses a secured per-user path and unique file name for the full export preview

test-case.description: restricts the export directory in code
test-case.name: V5 printer export hardening.restricts the export directory in code

test-case.description: does not rewrite ACLs when the export directory already exists
test-case.name: V5 printer export hardening.does not rewrite ACLs when the export directory already exists

test-case.description: hardens a newly created export directory once
test-case.name: V5 printer export hardening.hardens a newly created export directory once

test-case.description: returns structured WhatIf output
test-case.name: V7 simple spool cleanup.returns structured WhatIf output

test-case.description: returns structured WhatIf output under direct script preview
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.returns structured WhatIf output under direct script preview

test-case.description: honors AllowedExtensions when selecting spool files
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.honors AllowedExtensions when selecting spool files

test-case.description: resolves a secure log path and suppresses transcript, service, and file mutations during WhatIf preview
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.resolves a secure log path and suppresses transcript, service, and file mutations during WhatIf preview

test-case.description: matches AllowedExtensions case-insensitively
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.matches AllowedExtensions case-insensitively

test-case.description: does not restart the service when this invocation never stopped it
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.does not restart the service when this invocation never stopped it

test-case.description: restarts the service only when it was running and carries the FP temp cleanup rule
test-case.name: V7 logged spool cleanup behavior.restarts the service only when it was running and carries the FP temp cleanup rule

test-case.description: honors AllowedExtensions when selecting spool files
test-case.name: V5 logged spool cleanup behavior.honors AllowedExtensions when selecting spool files

test-case.description: fails validation when analyzer invocation crashes and records the failure in JSON output
test-case.name: Invoke-PSScriptAnalyzer helper.fails validation when analyzer invocation crashes and records the failure in JSON output

test-case.description: overwrites the JSON artifact with an empty array when no findings are returned
test-case.name: Invoke-PSScriptAnalyzer helper.overwrites the JSON artifact with an empty array when no findings are returned

test-case.description: returns clean empty artifacts when no PowerShell files are present
test-case.name: Invoke-PSScriptAnalyzer helper.returns clean empty artifacts when no PowerShell files are present

test-case.description: analyzes multiple files in one batch invocation
test-case.name: Invoke-PSScriptAnalyzer helper.analyzes multiple files in one batch invocation

test-case.description: does not surface analyzer invocation failures for the previously crashing repo files
test-case.name: Invoke-PSScriptAnalyzer helper.does not surface analyzer invocation failures for the previously crashing repo files

test-case.description: returns a preview-safe WhatIf result object
test-case.name: V7 installer orphan move behavior.returns a preview-safe WhatIf result object

test-case.description: skips reparse points and suppresses Move-Item during WhatIf preview
test-case.name: V7 installer orphan move behavior.skips reparse points and suppresses Move-Item during WhatIf preview

test-case.description: adds a timestamp suffix before moving when the quarantine target already exists
test-case.name: V7 installer orphan move behavior.adds a timestamp suffix before moving when the quarantine target already exists

test-case.description: returns a skipped result without creating quarantine when no installer references exist
test-case.name: V7 installer orphan move behavior.returns a skipped result without creating quarantine when no installer references exist

test-case.description: supports safe preview without elevation and returns the cleanup status contract
test-case.name: V7 advanced cleanup.supports safe preview without elevation and returns the cleanup status contract

test-case.description: counts only successful removals and skips Windows.old trust resolution when removal is disabled
test-case.name: V7 advanced cleanup.counts only successful removals and skips Windows.old trust resolution when removal is disabled

test-case.description: uses trusted cleanup specs and reparse-point guards
test-case.name: V5 complete cleanup hardening.uses trusted cleanup specs and reparse-point guards

test-case.description: counts only successful removals across update and cache cleanup loops
test-case.name: V5 complete cleanup hardening.counts only successful removals across update and cache cleanup loops

test-suite.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior
test-suite.description: V7 network reset and reboot behavior

test-case.description: returns a preview-safe WhatIf summary
test-case.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior.returns a preview-safe WhatIf summary

test-case.description: returns a skipped result in Windows Sandbox without running commands
test-case.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior.returns a skipped result in Windows Sandbox without running commands

test-case.description: requires elevation for non-WhatIf runs
test-case.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior.requires elevation for non-WhatIf runs

test-case.description: fails when a native network command returns a non-zero exit code
test-case.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior.fails when a native network command returns a non-zero exit code

test-case.description: fails when the reboot command returns a non-zero exit code
test-case.name: V7 network reset and reboot behavior.fails when the reboot command returns a non-zero exit code

test-case.description: skips reparse points and suppresses Move-Item during WhatIf preview
test-case.name: V5 installer orphan cleanup behavior.skips reparse points and suppresses Move-Item during WhatIf preview

test-case.description: adds a timestamp suffix before moving when the quarantine target already exists
test-case.name: V5 installer orphan cleanup behavior.adds a timestamp suffix before moving when the quarantine target already exists

test-case.description: returns a skipped result without creating quarantine when no installer references exist
test-case.name: V5 installer orphan cleanup behavior.returns a skipped result without creating quarantine when no installer references exist
